message: Stage -1 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start status=completed
Sharp full-history LP bounds established; baseline-pooling witness confirms strict gain and refutes T<=2 minimality.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to user: Case 6 (genuine difficulty, no upstream defect) + regression pattern (a) novelty flag persists across rounds 2-3 after round-1 correctness fix — the f1 specialization's flagship theorem is structurally non-novel under the locked PartialID tuple; the producer's own §counterexample (T=1) collapses the proposed T≤2 dynamic minimality, and the sharp LP theorem reduces to standard Balke-Pearl/discrete-response-type machinery. Reviewer's repair suggestion ('a genuinely new theorem such as a proved post-baseline dynamic coarsening separation') is research-level redesign of the flagship claim, not an algebra slip, missing case, or .tex error. No concrete one-stage rewind fixes this: rewinding to Stage -1 would re-generate the same angle under the same locked parameters; this is not Bucket A (no hypothesis to add — adding one would not restore novelty) and not Bucket M (no localized .tex defect).

Stage 0.5 ACCEPT under novelty_target=field (one-shot reviewer post-patch; stage_completed advanced to 0.5 manually; supersedes the earlier user-route intervention that was caused by target-mismatch).
Reverted manual stage_completed 0.5 -> 0 after honest pipeline-prompt re-test returned REVISE/subfield. The artifact's actually derived content is subfield, below novelty_target=field.
